MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY'S PETITION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS.
